title: Draft workflow catalog install post
summary: Create a LinkedIn post draft about the research-first principle for building agent workflows: before inventing a workflow, use the workflow catalog package to inspect existing agent workflows and save useful patterns for the agent to use.
acceptance_criteria: the post draft uses the user's rough spoken framing as primary voice source material
the next phase verifies the exact package name, install path, repository URL, and catalog counts before making public claims
the draft distinguishes the upstream workflow universe from any curated or searchable subset
the draft explains why researching existing agent workflows before inventing a new one improves workflow design quality
the draft explains the practical install/use story without overstating current package behavior
the draft frames the workflow catalog as a way for an agent to inspect existing workflow patterns before creating from scratch
the draft distinguishes source-backed claims about the package and catalog from personal reflection about the user's workflow-building approach
the final draft remains draft-only and requires explicit user approval before any external publishing action
any durable draft artifact is written only after a matching phase guard approval

context_snapshot.summary: Load the LinkedIn Posts project state, the active post-generation workflow task, the adjacent Agent Foundry post task, and this intake task before grilling or drafting the workflow catalog install post.

process_exceptions.reason: User explicitly approved creating this workflow-change intake task through initiate-task.

session_log.event: Created intake task after the user invoked initiate-task for a post about using the workflow catalog package to research existing agent workflows before creating new ones.
